scripts.deploy:public: npm run build:public && cp apps/public-site/next.config.ts . && cp -RL apps/public-site/.next/standalone/. . && cp -r apps/public-site/public . && cp -r apps/public-site/.next/static .next/static
scripts.deploy:admin: npm run build:admin && cp apps/admin-portal/next.config.ts . && cp -RL apps/admin-portal/.next/standalone/. . && cp -r apps/admin-portal/public . && cp -r apps/admin-portal/.next/static .next/static
scripts.deploy:ticketing: npm run build:ticketing && cp apps/ticketing-app/next.config.ts . && cp -RL apps/ticketing-app/.next/standalone/. . && cp -r apps/ticketing-app/public . && cp -r apps/ticketing-app/.next/static .next/static
